sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_string String);
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, 3) AS converted_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_string = '2023-10-18 15:45:30.999' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrNull(date_string, 5, 'UTC') AS utc_converted_date FROM test_dates;
